title: MC: Unknown
description: New biomes, mechanics, structures, and fun! That's what this modpack is all about.
body:
**Welcome to Minecraft: Unknown!** This modpack is in no means trying to be the best that has ever been or that will ever be. Instead we are trying to create a beautiful Minecraft experience for everyone to enjoy. Minecraft: Unknown can be played alone or with friends, we recommend bringing your friends, there is lots of fun to be had. We hope you have fun, this modpack is for you to enjoy! Along your travels you may find new biomes, structures, and wildlife. You will always be finding to things to explore or to create, your mind is the limit. As the pack continues to grow you will see new quests to do as well. The quests serve as both a guide to what is in MC: Unknown and a way to learn about new mods you may have never seen. **Initial Release will not feature quests, sorry for any inconvenience**

Support Request or Bugs? Join our Discord

[![Footer](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/f06ba0df-58e4-40b5-b991-ec8d0b49a1f2.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/OriginsStudios)
